name: Ski Day Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound broad egg noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt 4 tablespoons butter; stir in flour and add broth and sour cream, stirring until thick. Add nutmeg, pepper, and salt. Remove from heat and stir in sherry.
3. Arrange noodles in a 9-inch x 13-inch baking dish. Cover with chicken, mushrooms, and seasoning.
4. Melt remaining 4 tablespoons butter; mix with bread crumbs. Sprinkle bread crumbs and parmesan cheese over the casserole.
5. Bake for 30 minutes, or until hot and bubbly. May be made a day in advance, refrigerated, and baked when needed.
6. Serve with a simple steamed green vegetable.
